title: Question: Building verilator error on msys2
body:
---


Author Name: **HyungKi Jeong**
Original Redmine Message: 2141 from https://www.veripool.org



---

```
make[1]: Entering directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-3.890/src'
cd obj_dbg && D:/Program/TestDrive/Program/bin/msys64/mingw64/bin/make -j 1  TGT=../../verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj serial
make[2]: Entering directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-3.890/src/obj_dbg'
make[2]: Nothing to be done for 'serial'.
make[2]: Leaving directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-3.890/src/obj_dbg'
cd obj_dbg && D:/Program/TestDrive/Program/bin/msys64/mingw64/bin/make       TGT=../../verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj
make[2]: Entering directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-3.890/src/obj_dbg'
       Compile flags:  x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -I/mingw64/include -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -DYYDEBUG -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -MP -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-char-subscripts -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMPERL="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMPERL_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/mingw64/share/verilator"
x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -I/mingw64/include -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -DYYDEBUG   -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -MP  -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-char-subscripts -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMPERL=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMPERL_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/mingw64/share/verilator\" -Wno-unused -c ../V3ParseLex.cpp
In file included from ../V3ParseLex.cpp:37:0:
../verilog.l:882:8: error: stray '\' in program
 <TABLE>{crnl}  { NEXTLINE(); yymore(); }
         ^
../verilog.l:882:9: error: stray '\' in program
 <TABLE>{crnl}  { NEXTLINE(); yymore(); }
          ^
../verilog.l: In member function 'virtual int V3LexerBase::yylex()':
../verilog.l:882:1: error: expected primary-expression before '<' token
 <TABLE>{crnl}  { NEXTLINE(); yymore(); }
 ^
../verilog.l:882:10: error: expected primary-expression before '{' token
 <TABLE>{crnl}  { NEXTLINE(); yymore(); }
           ^
../verilog.l:883:1: error: expected primary-expression before '<' token
 <TABLE>";"  { FL; yylval.strp = PARSEP->newString(yytext,yyleng); return yaTABLELINE; }
 ^
../verilog.l:883:8: error: expected primary-expression before '{' token
 <TABLE>";"  { FL; yylval.strp = PARSEP->newString(yytext,yyleng); return yaTABLELINE; }
         ^
../verilog.l:884:1: error: expected primary-expression before '<' token
 <TABLE>"endtable" { yy_pop_state(); FL; return yENDTABLE; }
 ^
../verilog.l:885:1: error: expected primary-expression before '<' token
 <TABLE>.   { yymore(); }
 ^
../verilog.l:886:1: error: expected primary-expression before '<' token
 <TABLE><<EOF>>  { yyerrorf("EOF in TABLE"); yyleng = 0; yy_pop_state(); }
 ^
../verilog.l:886:8: error: expected primary-expression before '.' token
 <TABLE><<EOF>>  { yyerrorf("EOF in TABLE"); yyleng = 0; yy_pop_state(); }
         ^
../verilog.l:886:12: error: expected unqualified-id before '{' token
 <TABLE><<EOF>>  { yyerrorf("EOF in TABLE"); yyleng = 0; yy_pop_state(); }
             ^
../verilog.l:887:1: error: expected primary-expression before '<' token

 ^
../verilog.l:887:8: error: expected primary-expression before '<<' token

         ^
../verilog.l:887:17: error: expected primary-expression before '{' token

                  ^
../verilog.l:893:1: error: expected primary-expression before '<' token
    "`accelerate"    { } // Verilog-XL compatibility
 ^
../verilog.l:893:96: error: expected primary-expression before '{' token
    "`accelerate"    { } // Verilog-XL compatibility
                                                                                                 ^
../Makefile_obj:287: recipe for target 'V3ParseLex.o' failed
make[2]: *** [V3ParseLex.o] Error 1
make[2]: Leaving directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-3.890/src/obj_dbg'
Makefile:66: recipe for target '../verilator_bin_dbg' failed
make[1]: *** [../verilator_bin_dbg] Error 2
make[1]: Leaving directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-3.890/src'
Makefile:175: recipe for target 'verilator_exe' failed
make: *** [verilator_exe] Error 2


```

gcc 6.3.0 (x64)
bison 3.0.4
flex 2.6.3

It's same error on "verilator-3.900.tgz".
I don't know what is wrong.
